dyana.io.artifacts#

Artifact writing utilities.

Functions

dump_diagnostics(out_dir, stem, diagnostics)

Write deterministic diagnostics JSON under decode artifacts.

save_evidence_track(track, path)

save_json(data, path)

save_states(states, path)

dyana.io.artifacts.dump_diagnostics(out_dir, stem, diagnostics)[source]#

Write deterministic diagnostics JSON under decode artifacts.

Parameters:

  • out_dir (Path)

  • stem (str)

  • diagnostics (Mapping[str, Any])

Return type:

Path

dyana.io.artifacts.save_evidence_track(track, path)[source]#
Parameters:

  • track (EvidenceTrack)

  • path (Path)

Return type:

None

dyana.io.artifacts.save_json(data, path)[source]#
Parameters:

  • data (Any)

  • path (Path)

Return type:

None

dyana.io.artifacts.save_states(states, path)[source]#

None
